title: RESOURCE (FOSTER) PARENT SUPPORT AND RESOURCES - 211info
text: JACKSON COUNTY FOSTER PARENT ASSOCIATION RESOURCE (FOSTER) PARENT SUPPORT AND RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Support programs providing free clothing and school supplies for foster children as well as birthday, Christmas, and Easter gifts. Monthly support group meetings helping resource parents to network and connect with other resource parents. All services schedule to change, please contact directly. Confidential Address Eligibility: Membership to JCFPA is open to all foster, adoptive, and relative families residing in Jackson County Hours: No standard hours Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to learn about becoming a member FEES: Membership costs is $35 per year DOCUMENTS: Copy of certification certificate AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JACKSON COUNTY FOSTER PARENT ASSOCIATION
